title: scutellaria orthocalyx
intro: Scutellaria orthocalyx, also known as a type of skullcap, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Scutellaria orthocalyx include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Scutellaria orthocalyx can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
